instruction: 把供应商评估情况汇总一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '供应商'
ws['B1'] = '评级'
ws['C1'] = '交货准时率(%)'
ws['D1'] = '价格指数'
ws['A2'] = '优质原料厂'
ws['B2'] = 'A'
ws['C2'] = 98.5
ws['D2'] = 1.05
ws['A3'] = '新兴材料公司'
ws['B3'] = 'B'
ws['C3'] = 92.1
ws['D3'] = 0.95
ws['A4'] = '传统加工厂'
ws['B4'] = 'A'
ws['C4'] = 96.8
ws['D4'] = 1.0
ws['A5'] = '进口代理商'
ws['B5'] = 'C'
ws['C5'] = 85.3
ws['D5'] = 1.2
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/supplier_info.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把供应商评估情况汇总一下
从/home/user/Desktop/supplier_info.xlsx中找到评级为A且交货准时率最高的供应商，在/home/user/Desktop/supplier_note.txt末尾追加：'首选供应商：优质原料厂（准时率98.5%）'，保存

include: 首选供应商：优质原料厂
